title: Biomedical engineering student competes in Final Four for Gopher gymnastics team
summary_en: Biomedical engineering student Leah Gonsiorowski has dreamed of competing in the Final Four at the NCAA tournament — and that dream turned into a reality this past weekend.
title_cn: 明尼苏达大学生物医学工程专业学生随校体操队参加NCAA四强赛
